creator: bdheeman@gmail.com
text:
Despite of the fact that the existing maintainer is reluctant to take
and, or entertain update/change-request I submitted around 2 months and
3 weeks ago, either as a new port or to an existing finance/qtstalker
port, I think that this latest version of qtstalker is quite stable and
compatible with current finance.yahoo.com services.

A new upstream release includes many fixes of the same is also out.
Hence, I'm enclosing a new shar file.

Please feel free to commit this to existing and quite outdated
finance/qtstalker 0.28_1 port, if you prefer.

Kindly note that I shall take care of maintaining this
*finance/qtstalker-devel* port , if the needed and I also want to
relinquish using hotmail.com and, or yahoo.com accounts.
 
Thanks,
Regards,

-- 
Dr Balwinder S "bsd" Dheeman          Registered Linux User: #229709
Anu'z Linux@HOME                      Machines: #168573, 170593, 259192
